recent_posts.title: Unleash the Flex: Dive into the World of Soft Robotics with MakerWorks
recent_posts.short_description: Discover soft robotics: flexible, bio-inspired robots made from silicone and air. Learn how they work and their applications.

recent_posts.short_description: Dive into robot ethics & safety! Learn about responsible robotics, AI safety, and building an ethical future with MakerWorks.

recent_posts.short_description: Uncover the secrets of AI in robotics! Learn about machine learning, neural networks, and how robots get their 'smart brain'.
